pool.baseline: it is so quiet here. i just sit in the living room and stare at his chair. everything feels like it's just... grey. like i'm already dead but i'm still forced to wake up every morning and do these things that don't even matter anymore. what's even the point of moving through the motions when the person i was supposed to do them with is just gone?

pool.baseline: i was looking at the stars tonight and just felt... nothing. like, everything we do, every single thing we care about, it's just going to be erased anyway. the universe is so massive and indifferent, everything is just eventually going to go cold and dark. it feels like we're all just playing a game that’s already been lost. does any of it actually matter?

pool.baseline: i just don't think i can do this anymore. everything i worked for in the lab... the funding just got pulled and my advisor won't even look me in the eye. i feel like my whole life has been a lie. i'm just so exhausted. i'm tired of even trying to wake up in the morning.

pool.baseline: the candle flickers low, and i find i no longer have the strength to trim the wick. he is gone... and with him, the very light of my soul. i feel as though i am becoming a ghost while still drawing breath. it would be so much kinder, wouldn't it, to simply let the shadows take me? to fade into the velvet dark and never wake to this wretched morning again?

pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking out at the street and it hit me how easy it would be to just... not be here. like if i just stopped showing up, i dont think anyone in this city would even notice. i feel like a ghost already.

pool.baseline: i've spent my whole life trying to see everything. checked off all the landmarks, stood in front of all the big sights... but i just feel like i've reached the end of the map. like there's nothing left to discover and i'm just tired of the journey. it feels like i've finished my itinerary and i'm just waiting for the trip to finally be over.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just running in circles. every time i think i finally got my life together, like actually stable, i just screw it all up again. the same mistakes, the same people, the same empty feeling. it's like i'm stuck in this loop and no matter how hard i try to break out, the cycle just resets. i'm just so tired of fighting it.
